Three roles. That's the whole architecture.

  1. 1. Maker. Produces the artifact — code, doc, slide, report.
  2. 2. Checker. Verifies the artifact against a spec.
  3. 3. Orchestrator. Decides who runs when, and handles rework.
The reveal. Land the punchline: "Not 47 agents. Three roles, composed." Hold the slide for a beat before moving to evidence.
